title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.56.0 - autoclosed
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage) | `v1.55.1` -> `v1.56.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.56.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.56.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.55.1/v1.56.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.55.1/v1.56.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.56.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.56.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.55.1...v1.56.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to c/storage v1.55.0, then v1.56.0-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2046](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2046)
-   idmap: improve error messages by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2047](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2047)
-   overlay,chunked: Add some more O_CLOEXEC by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2048](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2048)
-   composefs: prefer std library functions by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2050](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2050)
-   docs: Add (not installed) man pages for composefs and zstd:chunked by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2054](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2054)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.23.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2052](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2052)
-   composefs use new mount api by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2057](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2057)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/user to v0.3.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2058](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2058)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.24.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2059](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2059)
-   chrootarchive: Pass root via fd by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2049](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2049)
-   loopback: always return error if no loopback device by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2056](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2056)
-   Update golangci-lint by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2063](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2063)
-   Prepare a golangci-lint installation for automatic update using renovate by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2064](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2064)
-   storage.conf: Various cleanups by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2066](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2066)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.6 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2068](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2068)
-   Create `Store.List` method for listing layers, images, containers by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2061](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2061)
-   \[CI:DOCS] Update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.60.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2070](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2070)
-   composefs fixes by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2069](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2069)
-   pkg/fileutils: fix Lexists on FreeBSD by [@​dfr](https://redirect.github.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2071](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2071)
-   pkg/fileutils: fix Lexists on FreeBSD (second attempt) by [@​dfr](https://redirect.github.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2074](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2074)
-   docs: Fill in more about composefs and zstd:chunked by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2072](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2072)
-   \[CI:DOCS] Update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.60.3 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2073](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2073)
-   Sync man page with storage.conf by [@​cgwalters](https://redirect.github.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2076](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2076)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20240821 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2077](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2077)
-   fix(deps): update golang.org/x/exp digest to [`9b4947d`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/commit/9b4947d) by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2082](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2082)
-   overlay: ignore EINVAL for cleanup unmount by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2083](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2083)
-   Be clearer about the layer store locking rules by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2080](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2080)
-   Be explicit about impact of not writing caches by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2079](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2079)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.25.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2085](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2085)
-   Update to Go 1.22 by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2086](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2086)
-   Avoid manually-coded loops by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2087](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2087)
-   Improve comments based on after-merge review comments by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2088](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2088)
-   chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.61.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2089](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2089)
-   pkg/directory: correctly ignore ENOENT while walking by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2097](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2097)
-   chunked: fix reuse of the layers cache by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2024](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2024)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2093](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2093)
-   Switch to github.com/moby/sys/capability by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2103](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2103)
-   userns: fix off-by-one userns max size detection by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2105](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2105)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.10 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2106](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2106)
-   Use strings.Cut{,Prefix,Suffix} where appropriate by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2100](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2100)
-   userns: skip "nogroup" by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2109](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2109)
-   Remove old +build tags, add gofix ci job by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2101](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2101)
-   overlay: additional layer: check layer existence before using by [@​ktock](https://redirect.github.com/ktock) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2108](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2108)
-   overlay: refactor getStagingDir helper by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2107](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2107)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.7 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2110](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2110)
-   Assorted nits reported by revive linter by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2102](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2102)
-   overlay: fallback without data only layers by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2112](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2112)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbatts/tar-split to v0.11.6 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2114](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2114)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/capability to v0.3.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2111](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2111)
-   Use tar-split/tar/asm.IterateHeaders now that it has been accepted by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2116](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2116)
-   chunked: ignore ErrLayerUnknown when creating cache by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2119](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2119)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.3 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2120](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2120)
-   chunked: define error for partial pulls not available by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2118](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2118)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.26.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2124](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2124)
-   Audit and update OWNERS file by [@​baude](https://redirect.github.com/baude) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2125](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2125)
-   CI: Fix `git-validation.sh` by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2121](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2121)
-   Fix copy/clone of empty value by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2122](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2122)
-   drivers/zfs: Handle missing layers during image deletion in ZFS file system by [@​kimminss0](https://redirect.github.com/kimminss0) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2123](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2123)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.4 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2127](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2127)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.11 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2132](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2132)
-   Fix assignment of quota project IDs by [@​mheon](https://redirect.github.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2129](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2129)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20241010 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2131](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2131)
-   chunked: prevent using an empty cache by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2133](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2133)
-   Use securejoin.SecureJoin when forming userns paths by [@​mheon](https://redirect.github.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2134](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2134)
-   Correctly compute UncompressedSize on zstd:chunked pull, don’t set it on estargz by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2130](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2130)
-   Follow-ups to [#​2130](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/issues/2130) by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2136](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2136)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.11.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2138](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2138)
-   ci: add codespell by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2137](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2137)
-   Fall back from partial pull when on VFS by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2140](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2140)
-   composefs: use mount from file where supported by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2145](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2145)
-   fsdiff: mount both layers are read-only by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2147](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2147)
-   Merge the release-1.55 branch into main by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2143](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2143)
-   overlay: use private directory for composefs mounts by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2148](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2148)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.8 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2144](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2144)
-   chunked: close payload stream by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2151](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2151)
-   Refactor copy of slices and maps by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2128](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2128)
-   overlay: make error lowercase by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2153](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2153)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.9 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2154](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2154)
-   Update copy.DirCopy to leave sockets in the file system by [@​anderbubble](https://redirect.github.com/anderbubble) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2117](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2117)
-   fix(deps): update golang.org/x/exp digest to [`f66d83c`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/commit/f66d83c) by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2158](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2158)
-   Disable partial pulls (zstd:chunked) by default by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2156](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2156)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​kimminss0](https://redirect.github.com/kimminss0) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2123](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2123)
-   [@​anderbubble](https://redirect.github.com/anderbubble) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2117](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2117)
